zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Knightley於大約1270年出生在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾時，他的父親Robert de Knightley lV23歲，母親Philippa Knightley15歲。他於1291年之前與Dorothy Glover結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Knightley于大约1270年出生在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾时，他的父亲Robert de Knightley lV23岁，母亲Philippa Knightley15岁。他于1291年之前与Dorothy Glover结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1316年在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Knightley was born about 1270, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, his father, Robert de Knightley lV, was 23 and his mother, Philippa Knightley, was 15. He married Dorothy Glover before 1291. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1316, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Knightley est né environ 1270, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Knightley lV, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Philippa Knightley, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Glover avant 1291. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1316, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Knightley um 1270 in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Knightley lV 23 und seine Mutter Philippa Knightley 15. Er hat vor 1291 Dorothy Glover geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1316 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Knightley è nato il circa 1270 nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Knightley lV, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Knightley, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Glover prima del 1291. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1316, nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Knightleyが約1270年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで生まれた時，父Robert de Knightley lVは23歳，母Philippa Knightleyは15歳であった。1291年以前にDorothy Gloverと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアグノサルで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Knightley(이)가 대략 1270년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Knightley lV(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Knightley(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1291년 이전 Dorothy Glover(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Knightley nasceu aproximadamente 1270, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Knightley lV, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Knightley, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Glover antes 1291. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1316, em Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Knightley родился около 1270 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Knightley lV было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Knightley, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Glover перед 1291 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1316 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Knightley nació aproximadamente 1270, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Knightley lV, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Philippa Knightley, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Dorothy Glover antes de 1291. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1316, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
